历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were approximately 719 → 1037 → 7635 → 1368 → 1190. In 2023, due to a nationwide drop in civil engineering, there was an abnormal plunge to 7635, quickly recovering to 1368 in 2024, and further rising to 1190 in 2025, showing a clear warming trend in the last two years, with a baseline ranking of about 1190 in 2025; from 2021 to 2025, the Science/Physics Category plans were 67 → 72 → 71 → 66 → 67, generally stable in the 66–72 range; the 2026 Physics Category plan is 58, a decrease of 9 from 2025 (a reduction of about 13.4%), which will intensify competition and theoretically push the minimum ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked 18th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with a stable ranking in the 16–18 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (paper data fabrication, dean dismissal, etc.), but the school's handling attitude is clear; Douyin popularity ranking is 26th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level; in 2025, there was an abnormal nationwide drop in admission scores to 604 points, which has a lagging effect on application psychology; Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Architecture A, Computer Science and Technology A, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A, Marine Science A, Landscape Architecture A, Business Administration A, etc., with 19 disciplines at A- or above, indicating extremely strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended majors, highly aligned with Tongji University's Information Engineering Experimental Class; Civil Engineering and Architecture popularity is divided between wait-and-see and obvious discouragement, but Tongji's Civil Engineering is an A+ top discipline, still attractive; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 167,000, estimated at about 113,894 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 68.2%, a decrease of about 3,513 from the 2025 Physics Category of 117,407 (-3%), a slight drop in total candidates easing competition slightly; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which is an inter-provincial application for Heilongjiang candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1190, the 2026 Physics Category enrollment reduction of about 13.4% (intensifying competition, pushing rankings forward), a slight decrease of about 3% in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Heilongjiang Province (easing competition), and a somewhat negative reputation (possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm), the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is about 1114, moving forward about 76 places from the 2025 ranking of 1190; range 987–1241.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted range of 987–1241, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Electronics, Science Experimental Class) as the main choice, with Tier 1 Guohao Elite Class and Excellence Plan Class as reach options, and Tier 3 Robotics and Intelligent Manufacturing as a safety option. The (5+3 integrated program) has a higher ranking requirement (about 1059 in 2025), so careful consideration based on the actual ranking of that year is needed.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 同济大学医学类在黑龙江省近四年最低录取位次分别为：2022年991名（计划6人）、2023年1047名（计划6人）、2024年1170名（计划8人）、2025年2365名（计划9人）。2022至 2024年位次稳步小幅上升，年均增幅约90名；2025年位次大幅跃升至2365名，较2024年上升1195名，主要受医学报考热度持续升温及新高考选科模式影响。2026年医学类总计划缩 至7人（较2025年减少2人，缩招约22.2%），其中临床医学（5+3一体化）4人、医学试验班3人，国豪精英班未单列招生。计划缩减对位次有下拉效应（更易考入），但医学热度惯 性形成一定对冲。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 同济大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校，位于上海市。其医学学科依托综合性大学优势，临床医学、基础医学等专业 实力突出，在东北地区享有较高声誉，对黑龙江省优质生源具有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来全国报考热度持续走高，临床医学（5+3一体化）作为本硕衔接培养项目，在黑龙江省考生中关注度极高。同济大学地处上海，地域优势明显，进一步增强了医 学类专业的报考吸引力。2026年黑龙江省医学类招生规模整体稳定，同济大学医学类计划缩减使竞争格局略有收紧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及近年位次趋势分析，预测2026年同济大学医学类在黑龙江省最低录取位次约为2080名，对应位次区间为1914至2246名。位次较2025年有所回落（更容 易考入），主要因招生计划缩减的供需弹性效应；但受医学热度持续及学校声誉支撑，回落幅度有限，整体仍处于近年高位区间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Tongji University's medical programs in Heilongjiang Province over the past four years are: 2022: 991st (planned enrollment 6), 2023: 1047th (planned enrollment 6), 2024: 1170th (planned enrollment 8), 2025: 2365th (planned enrollment 9). From 2022 to 2024, rankings steadily increased slightly, with an average annual increase of about 90 places; in 2025, rankings jumped significantly to 2365th, an increase of 1195 places from 2024, mainly due to the continued rise in medical program popularity and the impact of the new college entrance examination subject selection model. In 2026, the total medical enrollment plan is reduced to 7 (a decrease of 2 from 2025, a reduction of about 22.2%), including 4 for Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) and 3 for Medical Experimental Class, with the Guohao Elite Class not listed separately. The reduction in enrollment has a downward effect on rankings (easier to be admitted), but the inertia of medical popularity creates a certain offset.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and is selected as a Double First-Class construction university, located in Shanghai. Its medical disciplines leverage the advantages of a comprehensive university, with strong strengths in Clinical Medicine, Basic Medicine, and other majors, enjoying a high reputation in the Northeast region and continuously attracting high-quality students from Heilongjiang Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the national popularity of medical majors has been consistently rising. Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program), as a bachelor-master combined training program, has extremely high attention among candidates in Heilongjiang Province. Tongji University's location in Shanghai provides significant regional advantages, further enhancing the appeal of its medical programs. In 2026, the overall medical enrollment scale in Heilongjiang Province remains stable, but the reduction in Tongji University's medical enrollment plan slightly tightens the competitive landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and analysis of recent ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Tongji University's medical programs in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 will be approximately 2080th, with a corresponding ranking range of 1914 to 2246. The ranking will decrease compared to 2025 (easier to be admitted), mainly due to the supply-demand elasticity effect of the reduced enrollment plan; however, supported by the sustained medical popularity and the university's reputation, the decline is limited, and the overall ranking remains in the high range of recent years.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Medical Experimental Class (includes Clinical Medicine (Leading Talent Training), Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Biotechnology, Bioinformatics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice and use Tier 1 as a reach. Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) is the most competitive, while the Medical Experimental Class, as a broad category enrollment, can be a safe option.
